name: Fruit Preserve Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 13x9 inch pan.
3. Mix together butter and brown sugar until well combined.
4. Add flour and baking soda, stirring until smooth.
5. Blend in almond extract.
6. Stir in oats.
7. Spread mixture into the prepared pan.
8. Spread preserves over the mixture, leaving at least 1/2 inch from the outer edge of the pan.
9. Sprinkle toasted almonds on top.
10. Bake for 22 to 25 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
12. Makes approximately 20 bars.
Note: Experiment with different flavor combinations of extract, nuts, and preserves. Use old-fashioned or quick oats, but not instant varieties.
